unit_tests.note: 1 pre-existing failure in git-utils.test.ts (unrelated to Issue #501)

tests_added: tests/unit/lib/auto-yes-manager.test.ts: should return already_running when same worktreeId + same cliToolId
tests/unit/lib/auto-yes-manager.test.ts: should stop and recreate poller when cliToolId changes
tests/unit/lib/auto-yes-manager.test.ts: should preserve poller state on reuse
tests/unit/lib/auto-yes-manager.test.ts: should store cliToolId in AutoYesPollerState for comparison
tests/unit/lib/worktree-status-helper.test.ts: should pass lastOutputTimestamp as Date when timestamp exists
tests/unit/lib/worktree-status-helper.test.ts: should pass undefined when timestamp is null
tests/unit/lib/worktree-status-helper.test.ts: should not change behavior for worktrees without running sessions
commits: 50e6536: fix(auto-yes): prevent dual response and status instability
issues: 1 pre-existing test failure in tests/unit/git-utils.test.ts (detached HEAD state test) - unrelated to Issue #501
message: TDD implementation complete. All 7 new tests pass. Fix 2 (poller idempotency), Fix 1 (client timestamp propagation), and Fix 3 (status detection improvement) implemented. TypeScript and ESLint pass cleanly.
